ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2025 Continued To Jun-03-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF THE AXION GROUP DBA THE ROYAL OAK's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Plaintiff's counsel Frederic M. Douglas's unopposed Motion to be Relieved as Counsel is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Notice is inadequate per Code of Civil Procedure section 1008 and related rules and statutes. No Proof of service on file. Further, counsel's declaration fails to articulate any basis for a court order authorizing counsel's withdraw without client consent. A conclusory statement that his "withdrawal is mandatory" is not sufficient.

Moving counsel must lodge a proposed order that includes the above text no later than 8:30 am on April 15, 2025. Counsel shall send the proposed order by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

No proposed order received prior to Open Court. Moving counsel to submit a proposed order.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Continued To Apr-22-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to April 22,2025, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
